PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATHIOWETZ, DUANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOVAK DRUCE CONNOLLY BOVE & QUIGG $7,059.13 PRINCIPAL, $480.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,539.13, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST GREGORY V. NOVAK IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TRACY W. DRUCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - NO VALID PROOF OF SERIVE WITHIN CALIFORNIA. PLAINTIFF SHALL RECEIVE NOTHING ON HIS CLAIM AGAINST BRIAN K. MCNIGHT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
